extension.description: AutoLang language support for Visual Studio Code
command.startServer.title: Start AutoLang LSP Server
command.stopServer.title: Stop AutoLang LSP Server
command.restartServer.title: Restart AutoLang LSP Server
configuration.title: AutoLang
configuration.cli.path.description: Path to the AutoLang CLI binary. Defaults to the "autolang" command on PATH, and the extension starts the language server with the "lsp" subcommand.
configuration.dev.runServerFromSource.de: Only applies when running or debugging this extension from the AutoLang repository source. Starts the language server from the repository source instead of using autolang.cli.path.
